text: Delegate human-only and externally blocked loop actions with resumable state
description: Represent actions requiring legal identity, institutional access, credentials, judgment, or another external event as explicit dependencies. The loop should distinguish waiting_on_human from waiting_on_external, preserve context, and resume automatically when confirmation or evidence arrives.

status.comment: Human and external dependency states are distinct and resumable through correlated inbox evidence; awaiting user acceptance.

reflection: Added waiting_for_external across shared/backend/frontend contracts and worker liveness checks. Added external_action_required tool, durable request event/prompt, correlated evidence reply, automatic running-state restoration, and distinct UI labeling. Reused the existing inbox rather than implementing external systems. Verification: agent-tools and loop-worker typechecks pass; backend 53/53 tests pass; frontend production build passes.
